title: Multi-level Project permission as a managed template - VIEW ALL ITEMS

posts.author: 2025meli (Ian)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

VIEW ALL ITEMS permission in a Multi-level Project permission as a managed template has to be set equally for all permission levels. In my case I would like that all roles view everything except the Assigned Contributor so that the assigned contributor can focus better on their work and can only see the tasks they are assigned to.

What are you trying to achieve

Differentiation in roles so that VIEWING TASKS can be different for the different roles.
